reviewed_evidence.review_state: pre-commit assurance delta over immutable implementation source

scope: IntrinsicResourceV1 plus CanonicalResourceRolesV1 to RoleBoundIntrinsicResourceV1 boundary
body-derived ResourceId lookup and exact role-local ordinal
caller forgery resistance, absence rejection, stale-body substitution, and reject-no-op behavior
tests, exhaustive atlas, ordinal ceiling, generated and manual mutation, Kani, targeted Miri, fuzz, coverage, and quality claims
conformance non-claims, public documentation, publication privacy, and unrelated staged-work exclusion

findings: WP3c is a useful policy-independent composition boundary
a final ResourceV1 remains blocked by unresolved resource-policy authority and zero-quantity marker semantics
no canonical bytes, hash domains, roots, or stable reject codes should be introduced in this slice
the compile-fail example was corrected to supply both private fields
expected-valid Kani fixture failures were made proof failures instead of vacuous exits
authority wording was narrowed to consistency within one caller-proposed unauthenticated partition
complete body coverage and SHA-256 collision resistance were made explicit non-claims
silent fuzz fixture exits were replaced by fail-loud assertions
the public wrapper now reaches exact ordinal 255
three patch-bound compiling authority mutants closed the compiler-unviable automatic-mutant gap
Kani and branch-coverage scopes were recorded without overclaim

reviews.role: independent final evidence and publication audit
findings: 27 of 27 gate records parse, pass, and bind the exact implementation source and environment root
the index contains the exact record set and hashes
all three manual patches match their hashes and apply cleanly to the recorded source
README, worklog, conformance, package manifest, promotion boundary, and non-claims align
38 intended public paths contain no prohibited private names, credentials, local absolute paths, or sandbox markers
unrelated staged RFC work remains outside the WP3c path set

finding_disposition.finding: private-field compile-fail example could fail for the wrong reason
Kani and fuzz fixtures could exit without exercising the intended oracle
worklog fuzz count did not match the patch-bound record

excluded_review_attempts.reason: an external peer-review helper returned an authentication failure and no review conclusion

non_claims: agent review does not replace human Class C behavior and evidence review
the supplied partition remains caller-proposed and unauthenticated
review does not prove SHA-256 injectivity, arbitrary-partition correctness, funds safety, or production readiness
hosted CI and immutable post-commit assurance-delta attestation remain separate gates
